---
title: "Carbon Bender"
subtitle: "Bending the curve on carbon, one analysis at a time."
page-layout: full
---

Welcome to **Carbon Bender** — a personal blog dedicated to data-driven 
analysis on greenhouse gas emissions, decarbonisation pathways, and 
sustainability transitions.

Here you will find:

- 📊 **Data analysis** — charts and statistics on emissions trends
- 🗺️ **Maps** — geographic visualisations of climate and energy data  
- 💡 **Commentary** — insights on decarbonisation policy and progress

Browse the latest posts below, or visit the [About](about.qmd) page 
to learn more.
